title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of January 29
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Q4 Earnings Beat, Increase Y/Y
text: Arthur J. Gallagher's (AJG) Q4 results reflect higher adjusted revenues and margin expansion across the Brokerage and the Risk Management segments, offset by higher expenses.

title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 26, 2023 5:15 PM ET Company Participants Patrick Gallagher - Chairman, President & CEO Douglas Howell - Corporate VP & CFO Conference Call Participants Weston Bloomer - UBS Charles Peters - Raymond James & Associates Michael Ward - Citigroup Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo Securities Robert Cox - Goldman Sachs Group Mark Hughes - Truist Securities Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to Arthur J. Gallagher & Company's Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.67% and 2.68%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in Store for Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Arthur J. Gallagher's (AJG) fourth-quarter results are expected to reflect new business, strong retention and renewal premium increases across its business lines.

title: Why Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Aids Health Insurance Market With JCB
text: Arthur J. Gallagher's (AJG) acquisition of JCB is likely to strengthen its student health insurance market expertise and fortify its presence on the West Coast.

title: Arthur J. Gallagher: Executing The Inorganic Growth Playbook
text: Arthur J. Gallagher has announced more accretive tuck-in acquisitions over the last month. The Buck transaction, one of the larger deals, is pricey but should pay off over time.
